title: Anti-static Conical Burr Coffee Grinder, Adjustable Electric Mill, 38 Precise Grind Settings, Precision Timer, for Espresso, Drip and French Press, Black
description:
About this item
Precision Grinding Options: This coffee grinder offers 38 grind settings, enabling you to adjust the coarseness to suit any coffee drinks. From rich espresso to smooth French press, achieve the perfect grind for every flavor preference
Enjoy Optimum Flavor: Durable stainless steel conical burrs ensure a uniform grind size, preserving the essential oils and flavors of your coffee beans. Experience enhanced aroma and taste with every cup, making it the ideal choice for true coffee aficionados
Upgraded Anti-static Function: It adopts advanced anti-static technology, uses silicone bellows to generate air duct, cooperates with plasma generator to generate plasma, neutralizes static electricity, and is finally equipped with anti-static powder bin, which effectively prevents static electricity accumulation and mess-free grinding chamber and the worktop.
Quiet and Durable: This grinder is equipped with new generation of micro AC motor that operates quietly and offers exceptional durability. Enjoy a serene grinding experience, ensuring you can savor fresh coffee anytime without disturbing your peace
Smart Timer Grinding: 5 to 60 second timed grinding function, perfect for personal brewing and family gatherings. Whether you are brewing a quick cup of coffee for yourself or preparing coffee for a crowd, you can easily and accurately achieve the ideal grind
Easy to Clean and Maintain: This coffee grinder features a detachable design that allows for effortless cleaning. Simply remove the components for a quick rinse, ensuring that your grinder stays in top condition and ready to deliver fresh coffee flavor without the hassle
Compact Design: With its compact design measuring 6.9"L x 4.1"W x 11.2"H, this burr grinder will fit perfectly on any kitchen countertop. Its sleek profile ensures it blends seamlessly into your kitchen decor while providing powerful grinding performance
What You Get: SOWTECH coffee grinder, 2-in-1 scoop (brush and scoop), silicone bellows, manual. If you have any questions about our products, we will respond within 24 hours and solve any of your questions or concerns to ensure your satisfaction and worry-free shopping experience
reviews_5s:
I’ve been using the SOWTECH Conical Burr Coffee Grinder for a few days now, and it has completely elevated my coffee-making routine. Here’s why I love it:

Consistent Grinding: The conical burr design ensures uniform grind size every time, whether I’m making espresso, pour-over, or French press coffee. The consistency truly enhances the flavor and aroma of my brews.

Adjustable Settings: The adjustable grind size settings are a game-changer. I can easily switch between fine and coarse grinds, depending on the brewing method. It’s super versatile for all my coffee needs.

Anti-static Technology: The anti-static feature is fantastic! Unlike other grinders I’ve used, this one doesn’t leave a mess of coffee grounds sticking to the container. Cleanup is much easier.

Quiet and Efficient: The grinder operates smoothly and isn’t overly noisy, which is a big plus for early mornings. It grinds quickly without compromising quality.

Sleek Design: The compact and modern design looks great on my countertop and doesn’t take up much space.

Easy to Clean: The detachable parts make it simple to clean, and the included brush is perfect for reaching every nook and cranny.

Overall, the SOWTECH Anti-static Conical Burr Coffee Grinder is a fantastic investment for coffee lovers. It’s reliable, efficient, and delivers professional-quality results at home. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to take their coffee game to the next level!I bought this for my husband as he had this dinky one for years. I got tired of the noise and the time it took to fill up his container. This grinder for coffee is great. Less time and fast and efficient. I am so glad I bought it. It also is not as loud, you can still hear it but it doesn't sound like blasting going on. Well worth the money.I got this grinder for my new espresso machine, which doesn’t have a built-in one. My old blade grinder just couldn’t get the grounds fine enough, but this conical burr grinder has been a total game-changer. The coffee is now so fine and consistent—it feels like it’s store-bought.

I love the 38 grind settings; they make it easy to switch between espresso, drip coffee, and French press. The timer is super convenient, and the anti-static feature keeps cleanup simple. It’s well-made, easy to use, and has really upgraded my coffee game. Highly recommend it for any coffee lover!This Coffee Grinder is amazing! The 38 grind settings let me customize my coffee for espresso, drip, or French press with precision. The anti-static feature keeps the mess minimal, and the precision timer ensures consistent results every time. It’s sleek, quiet, and easy to clean. Highly recommend it to anyone serious about their coffee!I have Burr coffee grinder for some time and had to replace a broken one. In the past there was a constant fight with the static. The coffee stuck to everything and I had to take care it wouldn't be distributed all over the kitchen. This Burr grinder claimed to be ant-static and it is true (at least 99%). Ther2 is only very little static left and the grind is not any longer a problem. Th grinder is also much quieter than my old one. The coffee comes cold out of the grinding process, important if you don't want to reduce the taste of your coffee. The grinder is small and fits in the small corner I have for it. The last grinder broke after a year, so I will be back just in case it happens again.This grinder is easy to use and highly reliable. It handled constant grinding roasted coffee without any overheating or clogging, consistently delivering great results. With multiple options for fine grinding and a convenient design that makes adding and removing beans a breeze, I highly recommend it.This coffee grinder makes it easy to get fresh, flavorful coffee by grinding beans just before brewing. It has adjustable settings for different brew styles and is simple to use and clean. It is a great investment for coffee lovers who want better taste and control over their coffee.Why did I wait so long to purchase this exact grinder-I wish I hadn’t waited. This product lives up to all the positive reviews. It’s compact, powerful, easy to clean, does not make any mess (minus me spilling beans) produces perfect grinds for my French press and espresso maker! Yay! Buy it-you’ll love it. There you have it. I spilled the beans about how great this grinder is.This grinder is fabulous. EZ to use, grinds the beans perfectly, compact size which is great. Easy to take apart and clean. Great buy for the money. I love the product and recommend it highly.I love the different settings for espresso all the way to French press. It’s super easy to use. I love the features and I’m very happy with the product overall. The grinder I had before kept making the beans too fine and I ended up with prices of coffee grounds in my coffee. So love how that does not happen with this one!
reviews_1s:
Very disappointed with this coffee grinder based on the positive reviews and advertisement of "38 Precise grind settings". I opted for the conical bur grinder for more uniform grinding and found it failed miserably. The grind is inconsistent and oversized for the level of coffee machine setting chosen. The finest espresso setting is still too coarse and is barely good enough for a drip coffee producing only weak coffee. I tried 2 different types of beans with the same results and have used all types of coffee grinders in the past. After checking the user manual and inspecting the bur insert to see if I missed anything, ... it all seems normal. Unfortunately, this is the worst coffee grinder I have ever tried.First of all, yes this grinds your coffee beans and does an ok job of it.
Is this Anti-static? Absolutely not, these coffee grinds will be extremely static-ridden.
Why does this matter? Because with this machine your coffee grinds will have so much static they'll go everywhere except where you want them to creating a huge mess. This coffee grinder causes so much of a mess with the coffee grinds that I went back to my $10 coffee bean blender, which I atleast know won't create static-infused coffee to go flying all over the place. This machine is also extremely loud, maybe all burr machines are loud, idk, but I do know that this thing would wake up my sleeping baby if it wasn't on another floor of the house.
I was so excited to get this and have better coffee, but unfortunately I was just let down. Normally I'd just get over a small issue and keep using it, but the amount of flying coffee grinds from this machine is just too infuriating. Maybe I got a bad machine? Idk, but I do know this thing will never get used by me again.
Based on my experience, I wouldn't recommend this product. And honestly, I probably would have given this a 2 star rating if the product hadn't literally said anti-static in the title and description, but since that is either completely false or just a lie, I had to give it a 1 star.First one worked great for 2 days. Consistent grind, no static! Then it would not power on with out poking the power button several times. Once it powered on 10 minutes later! Then it was dead. Nothing. Makes a small surge noise. Replacement arrived! It worked ONCE. The next day it would not power on, same as the first one. It died after a single use! Buy at your own risk. There's several defective 1 star reviews like mine.I was excited to buy this coffee grinder since the description said anti static and not too noisy, and not messy. But in fact there was so much static charge the coffee grinds went everywhere. It did grind nicely. But it was also noisy. Too bad....

As you see from the photos all the static charge of the coffee grounds and the mess on the counter.At its best, this grinder makes a lot of noise and a huge mess--there is no way to move the coffee grounds from this grinder that does not create a mess.

After approximately 3 months, this grinder become intermittently unresponsive. I grind coffee twice a day, every day, and this is the worst coffee grinder I have ever owned.This grinder worked great for the first 3 months. Grind size was consistent and fast. Now it runs but won't grind any beans. I have cleaned it and tried different beans. When it does finally grind enough for a double shot of espresso (after several minutes of running it), there is a lot of static.Grounds coffee well but plastic cup under burr grinder for coffee grounds is not anti-static and caused a mess every morning after grinding coffee. Returned and paid the premium for the OXO burr grinder with a stainless steel cup that is anti-static and no mess.I received it today and it will not turn on. I read the installation instructions to make sure it was reassemble from the factory and it was. I will be returning this product and hopefully get another one that works.After about a month my grinder stopped working. I have to press the button 20 times and smack for the motor to start. It also makes a mess. Waste of money.Don't buy this product unless you want to prank a friend and have them constantly clean up coffee grounds from the Static this thing produces.

Absolutely worthless!
